doc: git status — shows staged, unstaged, and untracked files

gco <branch|file>
gco -- <file> to discard changes in a file

desc: Create and checkout a new branch
doc: gcob <new-branch> [<start-point>]

gcm -m "message" — commit with message
gcm --amend — amend last commit
gcm -a — stage all tracked files and commit

gbr — list local branches
gbr -a — all branches
gbr -d <branch> — delete merged branch
gbr -D <branch> — force-delete
gbr -m <old> <new> — rename

desc: Restore files in the working tree
doc:
grs <file> — discard unstaged changes
grs --staged <file> — unstage a file

gpush — push current branch
gpush --tags — push tags
gpush -u origin <branch> — set upstream

gsw — switch to main/master
gsw <branch> — switch to a named branch

gme — merge main/master into current branch
gme <branch> — merge a named branch

gls [<revision-range>] [-- <path>]
gll adds numstat, glsf adds graph + follow
gll [<revision-range>] [-- <path>]
glsf [<revision-range>] [-- <path>]
git sl [<revision-range>] [-- <path>]

git br — local branches
git br -a — all branches
git br --remote — remote only

desc: Branches in table format (date, author, branch, subject)
doc:
git bs — local branches
git bs --all — all branches

desc: Your branches only (filtered from git bs --all)

doc: git del <branch>

desc: Delete all local branches except main/master/current, prune origin
Auto-detect default branch, checkout, and pull
Plain-text patch output (no pager, no color)
doc: git patch [<commit-range>] [-- <path>]
git nuke [<commit>] — defaults to HEAD

desc: Hard reset + deep clean (removes gitignored files too)
Log of commits in a merge
doc: git merge-log <merge-commit>
git merge-diff <merge-commit>

desc: Authors sorted by commit count (with emails)
Authors sorted by commit count (names only)
Pull repo + all submodules, update main in each
git-gui — review files, create commits and branches
gitk --all — visual commit history and branches
lazygit — TUI for staging, committing, branching
